name: judgment-src
description: This repository contains general Codex project workflow governance skills and local plugin sources. It keeps routing, work decomposition, five-agent review, XA/XB development gates, AI/Agent safety rules, evidence checks, and dirty-worktree safety under version control for use across projects.

scripts.check:agent-office: node --check agent-office/app.js && node --check agent-office/mockData.js && node --check scripts/agent-office-bridge.js && node --check scripts/controller-agent-office-inbox.js && node --check scripts/list-agent-office-requests.js
scripts.check:runtime-contract: node --check scripts/post-agent-office-event.js && node --check scripts/record-agent-office-trajectory.js && node --check scripts/summarize-agent-office-trajectory.js && node --check scripts/lint-skills.js && node --check scripts/validate-runtime-contract.js && node scripts/validate-runtime-contract.js skill-artifacts/loop-engineering/examples/runtime-state.example.json --kind runtime && node scripts/validate-runtime-contract.js skill-artifacts/loop-engineering/examples/worker-packet.example.json --kind worker && node scripts/validate-runtime-contract.js skill-artifacts/loop-engineering/examples/555-verdict.example.json --kind verdict && node scripts/validate-runtime-contract.js skill-artifacts/loop-engineering/examples/trajectory-entry.example.json --kind trajectory && node scripts/summarize-agent-office-trajectory.js --input skill-artifacts/loop-engineering/examples/trajectory-ledger.example.jsonl --format json
